37145-002.name: I-39 / Maple Ridge interchange
37145-002.note: A 331-acre mixed-use district on Kronenwetter's southwest side around the Maple Ridge Road interchange at Interstate 39.

37151-001.name: Downtown / Hwy 29 business park
37151-001.note: Covers part of downtown Marathon City and the village business park along Highway 29, with a 2021 extension funding business park expansion.

37176-002.name: Pavilion Marketplace area
37176-002.note: Tied to Rothschild's 2013 Pavilion Marketplace redevelopment plan, offering incentives for commercial and mixed-use redevelopment.

37182-004.name: Hwy 153 business park & village
37182-004.note: Mixed-use district drawn in 2015 across much of the village, including a large part of the Highway 153 business and industrial park.

37192-001.name: Hwy 29 corridor / Weston Business Park
37192-001.note: Covers the Highway 29 corridor including the Weston Business and Technology Park and the medical campus area; trustees voted in April 2026 to close it.

37291-003.name: Downtown / Wausau Center site
37291-003.note: Covers downtown Wausau, including the former Wausau Center mall site.

37291-007.name: I-39 corridor commercial
37291-007.note: Created in 2006 to promote commercial development along the Interstate 39 corridor.

37291-008.name: Near west side riverfront
37291-008.note: Rehabilitation district on Wausau's near west side, funding street reconstruction and west riverfront redevelopment.

37291-010.name: Wausau West industrial park
37291-010.note: Covers the Wausau West Business and Industrial Park, site of the Great Lakes Cheese packaging plant announced in 2017.
